name: Oreo Crumble Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Oreos in a plastic bag and spread them evenly in a 9x13 inch baking pan.
2. Melt the chocolate chips and margarine together, then stir in 3 beaten eggs until combined. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
3. Add the remaining melted mixture to the egg mixture. Stir in powdered sugar and chopped nuts.
4. Pour the chocolate batter over the cookie crumbs in the prepared pan.
5. Freeze the cake until firm, about 2 hours.
6. Soften half a gallon of vanilla ice cream and fold it into the cooled cake batter.
7. Pour the creamy mix over the chocolate layer and return to the freezer.
8. Serve 15 minutes before eating, allowing the cake to set slightly for easy cutting.
